About

Building the future of
global manufacturing.

Hands-on experience across Maintenance, Process, and Global Engineering. Strong background in preventive maintenance, manufacturing processes, and Industry 4.0 initiatives.

Overseas

Global Missions

On-the-ground engineering across Southeast Asia and China.

Click to add photo
📍 Indonesia · Mattel Plant
Color Calibration & Laser Printing Optimization
Optimized printing performance through a deep-dive correlation analysis between CMYK and LcLmCMYK color profiles. Led color calibration and laser printing process optimization to ensure high-precision output and operational efficiency for regional manufacturing.
Click to add photo
📍 Guangdong, China
Digital Printing Vendor Visit & Machine Implementation
Visited Guangdong, China, working closely with a vendor to implement a digital printing machine integrated with a vision camera system, focusing on process validation, automation capability, and production readiness.
Click to add photo
📍 Penang, Malaysia · Mattel Plant
Global Color Management Presentation
Represented the team on an overseas trip, presenting global color management concepts across all Mattel plants to the engineering leadership team, standardizing color management practices for global manufacturing.
Click to add photo
📍 Bangkok, Thailand · Mattel
Sustainability Public Presentation
Delivered a presentation to EHS&S leadership on the design and compliance of a LEED-certified building — covering energy efficiency, water conservation, indoor environmental quality, and sustainable material selection aligned with global green-building standards.
Click to add photo
📍 Toshiba · Thailand
Project Improvement
Owned this Kaizen capstone project end-to-end — eliminating manual measurement waste (muda) by designing and deploying a self-developed automation tool to replace the manual workflow. Applied Lean principles to standardize work and remove operator variation, cutting cycle time by 90% for a repeatable, defect-resistant process.
Click to add photo
📍 Bangkok, Thailand
Kaizen Thailand Award 2026
Co-Owner and Kaizen Consultant specializing in Lean Manufacturing and Six Sigma methodologies, focused on continuous improvement, waste reduction, and cost optimization. Led a Kaizen project to reduce ink usage by applying displacement fluid techniques, resulting in lower ink consumption, reduced scrap cost, and improved process efficiency.
